UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information, typically obtained from an authentication provider.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity (e.g., Firebase user UID).

firstName.description: The first name of the user, used for personalization in the UI.

email.description: The email address of the user.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

PantryIngredient.title: PantryIngredient
PantryIngredient.description: Represents a single ingredient item that a user has in their virtual pantry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PantryIngredient entity.

name.description: The common name of the ingredient (e.g., "Eggs", "Rice", "Soy Sauce").

quantity.description: The descriptive quantity or amount of the ingredient in the pantry (e.g., "3", "1 cup", "a dash").

SavedRecipe.title: SavedRecipe
SavedRecipe.description: Represents a recipe that has been generated by the AI tool or imported and explicitly saved by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SavedRecipe entity.

title.description: The main title or name of the recipe.

chefName.description: The name of the chef who created the recipe, if identifiable.

prepTime.description: The estimated total preparation and cooking time for the recipe.

category.description: The meal category of the recipe.

ingredientsNeeded.description: A list of ingredients required for the recipe, where each item is a string combining the ingredient name and quantity.

instructions.description: An ordered list of steps or instructions to follow for preparing the recipe.

sourceUrl.description: Optional original source URL for imported recipes.

notes.description: User-added notes or modifications for the recipe.

savedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the user saved this recipe.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. Each document's ID is the Firebase Authentication UID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, matching Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Contains a user's personal pantry ingredients. Access is strictly restricted to the owning user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this pantry ingredient.

params.name: pantryIngredientId
params.description: The unique ID of the specific pantry ingredient.

definition.description: Stores recipes explicitly saved by a specific user. Access is strictly restricted to the owning user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who saved this recipe.

params.name: savedRecipeId
params.description: The unique ID of the saved recipe.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure uses path-based ownership for secure data segregation. By nesting all user data under a top-level 'users' collection using the UID as the document ID, we ensure atomic authorization where rules can simply check if 'request.auth.uid == userId'. The schema definitions match the actual output from Chef Mikeo's AI flows, including ingredientsNeeded, category, and sourceUrl.
